Currency Exchange &
International Payments
for the Legal Sector

We provide an expert currency exchange and international payments service specifically designed to help law firms achieve the best exchange rates.

Our Expertise

Marketing Leading Exchange Rates

Learn more

Secure International Payments

Learn more

Regulatory
Security

Learn more

Why work with us

Whether you are paying an international beneficiary during the administering of an estate or receiving funds from overseas for a UK property purchase, we can help you to achieve the best exchange rate.

  • Ensure your clients receive the maximum return from their legal transactions.
  • Protect against unwanted retrospective action in the event of a poor exchange rate outcome.
  • Expertise in global payments services, with multiple currency accounts for payment and receipt of international funds.
  • Fully regulated by the FCA and HMRC and operating safeguarded accounts for absolute security.

Register for a Currency Connect account now to access competitive exchange rates and our specialist payments service.

Register

Trusted By Our Clients

What Our Clients Say

Sara Janion
Worldwide Lawyers
We have regularly worked alongside Currency Connect when assisting law firms with international inheritance cases. Whether the law firm needs to receive money from an overseas bank account or send payments to beneficiaries abroad, Currency Connect have helped them to save their client’s serious money. By using Currency Connect’s expertise, the lawyers have added quantifiable value to their clients at the same time as complying with their professional obligations to act in their best interests – win win!
Duncan Jackson
Buckles
Ensuring the best interests of our clients are protected is paramount and the exchange rates offered by Currency Connect have always enabled us to maximise the amount our clients receive when making payments to them abroad. Dealing with any financial transaction involves a number of hurdles, but they make the process as simple as possible from start to finish and are always really responsive and helpful.
James McMullan
RIAA Barker Gillette
We have worked with Currency Connect now for a few years and found them to be very helpful and supportive with our foreign exchange requirements, which in turn has helped us to deliver a great service to our clients, saving them considerable sums of money over high street bank conversion rates. I would certainly recommend their service.
Grahame Reynolds
Lovell Chohan Solicitors
I have used Currency Connect on numerous occasions over the past eight years or so. Their staff are always pleasant, accommodating and efficient and making international payments through them releases me of this administrative headache. It also goes without saying that all of our clients have been more than happy with this arrangement, as they have received thousands of pounds more than they would have, if the usual bank international transfer facility was used. I can, without hesitation, thoroughly recommend them to any professional colleague.

Find Out How We Can Help You?

Speak to one of our expert currency consultants to find out how our service can benefit you.
